states.name: Mizuchi
states.title: White Snake Onmyoji
states.description: Mizuchi Akame is the descendant of the sacred White Snake, and an elite member of the most prestigious Bureau of Onmyo in Outer Eastland. While little is known about the isolationist region of Outer Eastland, the White Snake Onmyoji is widely rumored to be one of the four elite onmyoji who protect Outer Eastland from the Pandemonium.

states.name: Mizuchi
states.title: White Snake Onmyoji
states.description: In a parallel world where society has fully embraced science and technology, concepts such as "onmyodo" and magic are relics of the past. However, in this world, she is one of the few people called "Superhumans", people with supernatural abilities that would be considered magic in Erden. While many Superhumans tend to avoid the limelight, she is very outgoing and has no fear of being seen in public.

states.name: Mizuchi
states.title: White Snake Onmyoji
states.description: In her first year of high school, she became an internet celebrity after the videos she posted online went viral. Now, millions of fans tune into her channel to hear about her daily life as a Superhuman. Soon, streaming videos online and interacting with her numerous fans became her second life.
